---
title: "Where Should Cross-Border Payments Go Next? A Data Look at Southeast Asia"
description: ""
author: "Ying Hui Tan"
date: "2026-06-30"
categories: [Machine Learning, XGBoost, Random Forest]
image: hdb.jpg
open-graph:
  title: "Which HDB resale flat is the best buy? | Confounding Human"
  description: "Evaluating different HDB features using ensemble model (Random Forest & XGBoost)."
  image: coffee.jpg
twitter-card:
  card-style: summary_large_image
  title: "Which HDB resale flat is the best buy?"
  description: "Evaluating different HDB features using ensemble model (Random Forest & XGBoost)."
jupyter: python3

---
